name: agentarium
description: Browser-native demos for examinable AI agent systems.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @0xrezaa/core && npm run build -w @0xrezaa/model-webllm && npm run build -w @0xrezaa/chat-assistant && npm run build -w @0xrezaa/openharness
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @0xrezaa/core && npm run typecheck -w @0xrezaa/model-webllm && npm run typecheck -w @0xrezaa/chat-assistant && npm run typecheck -w @0xrezaa/openharness
scripts.format: npm run format:root && npm run format --workspaces --if-present
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:root:fix && npm run format:fix --workspaces --if-present
